title: Terracraft
description: A 2D sandbox where you build, explore, and survive in infinite worlds.
details: Dig, build, craft, and survive in this infinite 2D sandbox. Gather resources, fight enemies, build structures, and explore procedurally generated worlds.

title: Infinit Orbit
description: Navigate through an endless orbital maze with gravity-defying mechanics.
details: A challenging arcade game where you control a ship orbiting through procedurally generated obstacles. Test your reflexes in this minimalist space adventure.

title: GardenSage
description: Grow and nurture your digital garden with strategy and care.
details: A relaxing farming and garden simulation where you plant seeds, watch them grow, and manage your expanding garden. Perfect for chill gaming sessions.

title: Rogue AI
description: Battle against intelligent AI in this strategic roguelike.
details: An AI-driven roguelike where every enemy adapts to your playstyle. Defeat procedurally intelligent opponents in this challenging tactical game.
